Assignment - Class in model
This class represents an assignment between two participnts in a raffle, where one participant (giver) is assigned to gift another (receiver)

P

Participant - Class in model
This class represents a person participating within the raffle.

R

Raffle - Class in model
This class represents the raffle itself, including its participants, restrictions, and assigments
Raffle(String, String, double, LocalDate) - Constructor for class model.Raffle
 
RaffleManager - Class in model
Manages all raffles in the system, acting as the entry point for UI operations

RaffleStatus - Enum Class in model
This is an Enum that represents possible raffle status
